title: adjutant_task
description: v1. The shape of a task the poller hands the gate and executor: derived from an open_loop's task fields, a decision's execution step, or a schedule record. Not a vault record type. (Spec named this adjutant_task_v1.json; repo convention is *.schema.json with the version documented here.)

payload.description: Executor arguments. Always copied from the task record — never authored by generation.
